description_long: This is a two-seater sofa upholstered in a deep burgundy or dark red material, likely leather or faux leather, with a smooth and slightly glossy finish. The sofa features two individual seat cushions and two backrest cushions, both of which are attached and display subtle tufting for added visual interest. The armrests are present on both sides, straight and padded, rising to the same height as the backrest for a boxy, modern silhouette. The legs are short, black, and positioned at the corners, barely visible beneath the base, suggesting a sturdy yet unobtrusive support. The back of the sofa is plain and unadorned, matching the upholstery of the rest of the piece. This sofa would be suitable for placement in urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, burgundy two-seater sofa with attached tufted cushions, straight padded armrests, and short black corner legs. The upholstery is smooth and slightly glossy, giving it a sleek, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two seat and back cushions with subtle tufting, straight padded armrests, and the sofa's symmetrical design.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's boxy profile, the height of the armrest relative to the backrest, and the short black leg at the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, continuous backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the straight armrest, attached backrest, and corner leg.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two attached seat cushions and two attached back cushions, all uniform in size with subtle tufting, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests present on both sides, rising to the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, modern profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, black legs positioned at the corners, block-style, minimally visible and likely made of wood or metal.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two attached, subtly tufted cushions, matching the seat arrangement.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and subtle tufting on the back cushions; no visible decorative stitching or patterned texture.
